---
title: "scRNA Integration QC"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.metadata
import platform
import subprocess
import tomllib

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import scanpy as sc

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
import sys
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from integration_io import (
    ensure_counts_layer,
    load_adata,
    normalize_text_series,
    require_obs_column,
    resolve_optional_obs_column,
    resolve_sample_display,
)
from integration_methods import (
    ALLOWED_METHODS,
    ensure_hvg_subset,
    run_baseline_embedding,
    run_classical_integration,
    run_scvi_integration,
)
from integration_metrics import compare_baseline_and_integrated

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
CONFIG_PATH = ROOT / "config" / "project.toml"


def load_config(path: Path) -> dict:
    with path.open("rb") as fh:
        return tomllib.load(fh)


def ensure_parent(path: Path) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)


def write_table(path: Path, df: pd.DataFrame) -> None:
    ensure_parent(path)
    df.to_csv(path, index=False)


def write_h5ad(path: Path, adata) -> None:
    ensure_parent(path)
    adata.write_h5ad(path)


def package_versions_table(packages: list[str]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    rows = []
    for package in packages:
        try:
            version = importlib.metadata.version(package)
        except importlib.metadata.PackageNotFoundError:
            version = "not installed"
        rows.append({"package": package, "version": version})
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)


def command_version(command: list[str]) -> str:
    try:
        completed = subprocess.run(command, check=False, capture_output=True, text=True)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        return "not installed"
    output = "\n".join(part.strip() for part in (completed.stdout, completed.stderr) if part.strip())
    return output.splitlines()[0] if output else "not installed"


def format_table(df: pd.DataFrame, digits: int = 3):
    out = df.copy()

    def _fmt_text(value):
        if pd.isna(value):
            return ""
        return str(value)

    def _fmt_int(value):
        if pd.isna(value):
            return ""
        return f"{int(round(float(value))):,}"

    def _fmt_float(value):
        if pd.isna(value):
            return ""
        return f"{float(value):,.{digits}f}"

    formatters = {}
    for col in out.columns:
        series = out[col]
        lower = str(col).lower()
        if pd.api.types.is_integer_dtype(series):
            formatters[col] = _fmt_int
        elif pd.api.types.is_float_dtype(series):
            if "fraction" in lower or "score" in lower or "entropy" in lower:
                formatters[col] = _fmt_float
            elif lower.startswith("n_") or lower.endswith("_count") or lower.endswith("_counts"):
                formatters[col] = _fmt_int
            else:
                formatters[col] = _fmt_float
        else:
            formatters[col] = _fmt_text

    return (
        out.style
        .hide(axis="index")
        .format(formatters)
        .set_table_attributes('style="width:100%; min-width:100%; table-layout:auto; margin:0;"')
        .set_properties(**{"white-space": "normal"})
        .set_table_styles(
            [
                {"selector": "th", "props": [("text-align", "left"), ("font-weight", "600")]},
                {"selector": "td", "props": [("padding", "0.25rem 0.5rem")]},
                {"selector": "table", "props": [("font-size", "0.95rem"), ("width", "100%")]},
            ]
        )
    )


def embedding_frame(adata, basis: str, color_keys: list[str]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    coords = adata.obsm[basis]
    frame = pd.DataFrame(coords[:, :2], columns=["dim_1", "dim_2"], index=adata.obs_names)
    keep = [key for key in color_keys if key in adata.obs.columns]
    return frame.join(adata.obs[keep], how="left")


cfg = load_config(CONFIG_PATH)
cfg
```

## Input Review

Best-practice guidance recommends inspecting the unintegrated object before applying any batch correction so that the magnitude and possible sources of batch effects are visible.

```{python}
adata, input_path = load_adata(str(cfg["input"]["input_h5ad"]))
integration_method = str(cfg["integration"]["integration_method"]).strip().lower()
if integration_method not in ALLOWED_METHODS:
    raise RuntimeError("integration_method must be one of: " + ", ".join(sorted(ALLOWED_METHODS)))

batch_key = str(cfg["metadata"]["batch_key"]).strip() or "batch"
condition_key = str(cfg["metadata"]["condition_key"]).strip() or "condition"
sample_id_key = str(cfg["metadata"]["sample_id_key"]).strip() or "sample_id"
sample_label_key = str(cfg["metadata"]["sample_label_key"]).strip() or "sample_display"
label_key_for_metrics = str(cfg["metadata"]["label_key_for_metrics"]).strip()

require_obs_column(adata, batch_key, allow_single_category=False)
adata.obs[sample_id_key] = resolve_optional_obs_column(adata, sample_id_key, fallback="unknown")
adata.obs[condition_key] = resolve_optional_obs_column(adata, condition_key, fallback="unknown")
adata.obs["sample_display"] = resolve_sample_display(adata, sample_id_key, sample_label_key)
if label_key_for_metrics:
    adata.obs[label_key_for_metrics] = resolve_optional_obs_column(adata, label_key_for_metrics, fallback="")

working = ensure_hvg_subset(
    adata,
    use_hvgs_only=bool(cfg["integration"]["use_hvgs_only"]),
    n_top_hvgs=int(cfg["integration"]["n_top_hvgs"]),
)

baseline = run_baseline_embedding(
    working,
    n_pcs=int(cfg["integration"]["n_pcs"]),
    n_neighbors=int(cfg["integration"]["n_neighbors"]),
    umap_min_dist=float(cfg["integration"]["umap_min_dist"]),
    cluster_resolution=float(cfg["integration"]["cluster_resolution"]),
    random_state=int(cfg["integration"]["random_seed"]),
)

out_adata = ROOT / str(cfg["output"]["adata_file"])
integration_summary_file = ROOT / str(cfg["output"]["integration_summary_file"])
integration_metrics_file = ROOT / str(cfg["output"]["integration_metrics_file"])
batch_mixing_summary_file = ROOT / str(cfg["output"]["batch_mixing_summary_file"])
cluster_counts_file = ROOT / str(cfg["output"]["cluster_counts_file"])
tables_dir = ROOT / "results" / "tables"
tables_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

overview_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "input_h5ad", "value": str(input_path)},
        {"field": "integration_method", "value": integration_method},
        {"field": "batch_key", "value": batch_key},
        {"field": "label_key_for_metrics", "value": label_key_for_metrics},
        {"field": "n_cells", "value": int(working.n_obs)},
        {"field": "n_genes", "value": int(working.n_vars)},
        {"field": "n_batches", "value": int(working.obs[batch_key].nunique())},
    ]
)
format_table(overview_df)
```

## Unintegrated Baseline

These figures are the pre-correction baseline. If batches already overlap well here, integration may be unnecessary and could remove meaningful biological variation.

```{python}
baseline_plot_df = embedding_frame(baseline, "X_umap", ["baseline_leiden", batch_key, condition_key, "sample_display", sample_id_key] + ([label_key_for_metrics] if label_key_for_metrics else []))
px.scatter(
    baseline_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color=batch_key,
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", sample_id_key, condition_key, "baseline_leiden", label_key_for_metrics] if key in baseline_plot_df.columns],
    title=f"Unintegrated baseline UMAP by {batch_key}",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

```{python}
px.scatter(
    baseline_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color="baseline_leiden",
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", sample_id_key, batch_key, condition_key, label_key_for_metrics] if key in baseline_plot_df.columns],
    title="Unintegrated baseline UMAP by baseline Leiden cluster",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

## Integration

The integration run uses the selected method on the validated batch variable. Methods that require raw counts fail if `layers["counts"]` is not present.

```{python}
method_notes = []
if integration_method in {"scvi", "scanvi"}:
    counts_layer = ensure_counts_layer(working, method=integration_method)
    integrated = run_scvi_integration(
        working,
        method=integration_method,
        batch_key=batch_key,
        counts_layer=counts_layer,
        scanvi_label_key=str(cfg["integration"]["scanvi_label_key"]).strip(),
        scanvi_unlabeled_category=str(cfg["integration"]["scanvi_unlabeled_category"]).strip() or "Unknown",
        scvi_latent_dim=int(cfg["integration"]["scvi_latent_dim"]),
        scvi_max_epochs=int(cfg["integration"]["scvi_max_epochs"]),
        scvi_gene_likelihood=str(cfg["integration"]["scvi_gene_likelihood"]).strip() or "zinb",
        scvi_accelerator=str(cfg["integration"]["scvi_accelerator"]).strip() or "auto",
        scvi_devices=int(cfg["integration"]["scvi_devices"]),
        n_neighbors=int(cfg["integration"]["n_neighbors"]),
        umap_min_dist=float(cfg["integration"]["umap_min_dist"]),
        cluster_resolution=float(cfg["integration"]["cluster_resolution"]),
        random_state=int(cfg["integration"]["random_seed"]),
    )
else:
    integrated = run_classical_integration(
        working,
        method=integration_method,
        batch_key=batch_key,
        n_pcs=int(cfg["integration"]["n_pcs"]),
        n_neighbors=int(cfg["integration"]["n_neighbors"]),
        umap_min_dist=float(cfg["integration"]["umap_min_dist"]),
        cluster_resolution=float(cfg["integration"]["cluster_resolution"]),
        random_state=int(cfg["integration"]["random_seed"]),
        harmony_theta=float(cfg["integration"]["harmony_theta"]),
        harmony_lambda=float(cfg["integration"]["harmony_lambda"]),
        harmony_max_iter=int(cfg["integration"]["harmony_max_iter"]),
        bbknn_neighbors_within_batch=int(cfg["integration"]["bbknn_neighbors_within_batch"]),
        bbknn_trim=int(cfg["integration"]["bbknn_trim"]),
    )
    if integration_method == "bbknn" and integrated.n_obs > 100000 and int(cfg["integration"]["bbknn_neighbors_within_batch"]) < 25:
        method_notes.append("For BBKNN, the single-cell best-practices guide suggests considering 25 neighbors per batch for datasets above 100,000 cells.")

integrated.uns["integration_method"] = integration_method
integrated.uns["input_source_template"] = str(cfg["input"]["input_source_template"])
integrated.uns["integration_params"] = {
    "batch_key": batch_key,
    "condition_key": condition_key,
    "sample_id_key": sample_id_key,
    "sample_label_key": sample_label_key,
    "label_key_for_metrics": label_key_for_metrics or None,
    "use_hvgs_only": bool(cfg["integration"]["use_hvgs_only"]),
    "n_top_hvgs": int(cfg["integration"]["n_top_hvgs"]),
    "n_pcs": integrated.uns.get("integration_n_pcs"),
    "n_neighbors": int(cfg["integration"]["n_neighbors"]),
    "umap_min_dist": float(cfg["integration"]["umap_min_dist"]),
    "cluster_resolution": float(cfg["integration"]["cluster_resolution"]),
}

cluster_counts = (
    integrated.obs.groupby("leiden", dropna=False)
    .size()
    .rename("n_cells")
    .reset_index()
    .sort_values("n_cells", ascending=False)
)

batch_mixing_summary = (
    integrated.obs.groupby(batch_key, dropna=False)
    .agg(
        n_cells=(batch_key, "size"),
        n_clusters=("leiden", "nunique"),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
batch_mixing_summary["fraction_of_cells"] = batch_mixing_summary["n_cells"] / integrated.n_obs

metrics_df = compare_baseline_and_integrated(
    baseline,
    integrated,
    batch_key=batch_key,
    label_key=label_key_for_metrics,
    baseline_rep="X_pca",
    integrated_rep=str(integrated.uns["integration_embedding_key"]),
    n_neighbors=int(cfg["integration"]["n_neighbors"]),
    run_scib_metrics=bool(cfg["integration"]["run_scib_metrics"]),
)

integration_summary = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "project_name", "value": cfg["project"]["name"]},
        {"field": "input_h5ad", "value": str(input_path)},
        {"field": "input_source_template", "value": str(cfg["input"]["input_source_template"])},
        {"field": "integration_method", "value": integration_method},
        {"field": "integration_embedding_key", "value": str(integrated.uns["integration_embedding_key"])},
        {"field": "batch_key", "value": batch_key},
        {"field": "label_key_for_metrics", "value": label_key_for_metrics},
        {"field": "n_cells", "value": int(integrated.n_obs)},
        {"field": "n_genes", "value": int(integrated.n_vars)},
        {"field": "n_batches", "value": int(integrated.obs[batch_key].nunique())},
        {"field": "n_clusters", "value": int(integrated.obs["leiden"].nunique())},
        {"field": "method_note", "value": " ".join(method_notes)},
        {"field": "output_h5ad", "value": str(out_adata)},
    ]
)

write_table(integration_summary_file, integration_summary)
write_table(integration_metrics_file, metrics_df)
write_table(batch_mixing_summary_file, batch_mixing_summary)
write_table(cluster_counts_file, cluster_counts)
write_h5ad(out_adata, integrated)

session_info_df = pd.concat(
    [
        pd.DataFrame(
            [
                {"package": "python", "version": platform.python_version()},
                {"package": "platform", "version": platform.platform()},
            ]
        ),
        package_versions_table(
            [
                "scanpy",
                "anndata",
                "numpy",
                "pandas",
                "scipy",
                "plotly",
                "scikit-learn",
                "igraph",
                "leidenalg",
                "bbknn",
                "harmonypy",
                "scanorama",
                "scvi-tools",
                "torch",
            ]
        ),
        pd.DataFrame([{"package": "quarto", "version": command_version(["quarto", "--version"])}]),
    ],
    ignore_index=True,
)
write_table(tables_dir / "session_info.csv", session_info_df)

integration_summary
```

## Integration Metrics

These metrics compare the unintegrated baseline and the integrated result. Batch-mixing metrics should improve after integration, while label-conservation metrics should remain plausible when a label column is available.

```{python}
format_table(metrics_df)
```

## Batch Mixing Summary

```{python}
format_table(batch_mixing_summary)
```

## Cluster Counts

```{python}
format_table(cluster_counts)
```

## Integrated UMAP

```{python}
integrated_plot_df = embedding_frame(integrated, "X_umap", ["leiden", batch_key, condition_key, "sample_display", sample_id_key] + ([label_key_for_metrics] if label_key_for_metrics else []))
px.scatter(
    integrated_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color=batch_key,
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", sample_id_key, condition_key, "leiden", label_key_for_metrics] if key in integrated_plot_df.columns],
    title=f"Integrated UMAP by {batch_key}",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

```{python}
px.scatter(
    integrated_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color="leiden",
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", sample_id_key, batch_key, condition_key, label_key_for_metrics] if key in integrated_plot_df.columns],
    title="Integrated UMAP by Leiden cluster",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

```{python}
if condition_key in integrated_plot_df.columns and normalize_text_series(integrated_plot_df[condition_key], fallback="").replace("", np.nan).dropna().nunique() >= 2:
    px.scatter(
        integrated_plot_df,
        x="dim_1",
        y="dim_2",
        color=condition_key,
        hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", sample_id_key, batch_key, "leiden", label_key_for_metrics] if key in integrated_plot_df.columns],
        title=f"Integrated UMAP by {condition_key}",
        template="simple_white",
    ).update_layout(height=650)
else:
    print(f"No condition-level integrated UMAP shown because '{condition_key}' is not defined with at least two non-missing values.")
```

## Session Info

```{python}
format_table(session_info_df)
```
